EQUATIONS OF THE ABOVE CHARTS ;A,B,C,D,E
A+SATURN+VENUS+DRAGON HEAD+SAPfAMA GURU-
Hence the native is an Anaesthesist=MOKSHA GURU.
B=SATURN+MOON+DRAGON HEAD+VENUS ASPECT
(Venus is also in the East) and there is the aspect of Retro Jupiter.
Hence the native is also an anaesthesist=MOKSHA GURU.
C=SATURN+JUPITER+MERCURY+MOON+MARS-all are in
the South Signs. But Venus aspects from the North.
D=SATURN+ JUPITER+DRAGON TAIL=Adoctor (MOKSHA
GURU YOGA).
E=SATURN+MERCURY+MARS+Ilth JUPITER to the
SATURN= pertaining to knowledge of technical lines (GURU
KARMA)-hence a Lecturer/a Professor in Technical/Engineering lines.
